##NAMES=Muirite
##RRUFFID=R120160
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ba_10_Ca_2_Mn^2+^TiSi_10_O_30_(OH,Cl,F)_10_
##LOCALITY=Gun Claim, MacMillian Pass, Itsy Mts, Watson Lake Mining District, Yukon Territory, Canada
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Donald Doell
##DESCRIPTION=Orange-red massive, associated with colorless sanbornite with good cleavage, diopside, and witherite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120160
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 14.019 b: 14.019 c: 5.6393 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 1108.3 crystal system: tetragonal
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
